markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on Ambient's feedback and refine the content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Lw1MVFY3MoYMZgGozywGx4hBE78C4Uxt?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Proactive Communication:** To counter reactive feedback, Bailey will create a Notion doc detailing the content process (keyword analysis, AI-assisted writing, vetting) to build client trust and manage expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/Lw1MVFY3MoYMZgGozywGx4hBE78C4Uxt?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [**Strategic Reframing:** The strategy will be reframed around outranking competitors for high-intent keywords, using a "problem-to-keyword matrix" to ensure comprehensive coverage.](https://fathom.video/share/Lw1MVFY3MoYMZgGozywGx4hBE78C4Uxt?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [**New Content Pipeline:** A new workflow will repurpose webinar transcripts into \~9 SEO articles per event, capturing Ambient's narrative and generating new keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/Lw1MVFY3MoYMZgGozywGx4hBE78C4Uxt?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)
  - [**Client Alignment:** Bailey will use client syncs to highlight conflicting feedback (e.g., "ambient intelligence" term usage) to force team-wide alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/Lw1MVFY3MoYMZgGozywGx4hBE78C4Uxt?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)

## Topics

### Client Feedback & Strategy Conflict

  - [**Problem:** Alberto's reactive, stream-of-consciousness feedback in Slack is often misaligned with the core strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Lw1MVFY3MoYMZgGozywGx4hBE78C4Uxt?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [**Example 1: Keyword Conflict**](https://fathom.video/share/Lw1MVFY3MoYMZgGozywGx4hBE78C4Uxt?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
      - [**Client Request:** A second article for the same keyword, based on a Claude-generated draft with unsourced stats.](https://fathom.video/share/Lw1MVFY3MoYMZgGozywGx4hBE78C4Uxt?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
      - [**Our Position:** This is inefficient and undermines the vetted research process. The strategy is driven by search volume and keyword difficulty, not ad-hoc requests.](https://fathom.video/share/Lw1MVFY3MoYMZgGozywGx4hBE78C4Uxt?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [**Example 2: Jargon Conflict**](https://fathom.video/share/Lw1MVFY3MoYMZgGozywGx4hBE78C4Uxt?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
      - [**Client Request:** Remove "vendor jargon" from the manufacturing plant article.](https://fathom.video/share/Lw1MVFY3MoYMZgGozywGx4hBE78C4Uxt?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
      - [**Our Position:** The terms were pulled directly from Ambient's own messaging doc. This highlights internal misalignment on brand voice.](https://fathom.video/share/Lw1MVFY3MoYMZgGozywGx4hBE78C4Uxt?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [**Example 3: Gun Detection Content**](https://fathom.video/share/Lw1MVFY3MoYMZgGozywGx4hBE78C4Uxt?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
      - [**Client Request:** Improve search performance for gun detection.](https://fathom.video/share/Lw1MVFY3MoYMZgGozywGx4hBE78C4Uxt?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
      - [**Our Position:** Performance stalled because the client deprioritized this content lane. The solution is to re-prioritize and refresh existing articles, not create new ones.](https://fathom.video/share/Lw1MVFY3MoYMZgGozywGx4hBE78C4Uxt?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)

### Proposed Solutions & New Initiatives

  - [**Process Documentation:** Bailey will draft a Notion doc detailing the content process to build client trust and manage expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/Lw1MVFY3MoYMZgGozywGx4hBE78C4Uxt?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
      - [**Process:** Keyword analysis → Atlas generation → Vetting against messaging docs & white papers → Manual research for intent & competitor analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/Lw1MVFY3MoYMZgGozywGx4hBE78C4Uxt?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [**Strategic Reframing:** The strategy will emphasize outranking competitors for high-intent keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/Lw1MVFY3MoYMZgGozywGx4hBE78C4Uxt?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
      - [**Tool:** A "problem-to-keyword matrix" will ensure comprehensive coverage of all customer problems.](https://fathom.video/share/Lw1MVFY3MoYMZgGozywGx4hBE78C4Uxt?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
  - [**New Content Pipeline: Webinar Repurposing**](https://fathom.video/share/Lw1MVFY3MoYMZgGozywGx4hBE78C4Uxt?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** Repurpose webinar transcripts into \~9 SEO articles per event.](https://fathom.video/share/Lw1MVFY3MoYMZgGozywGx4hBE78C4Uxt?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)
      - [**Benefits:** Captures Ambient's narrative and generates new keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/Lw1MVFY3MoYMZgGozywGx4hBE78C4Uxt?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)
      - [**CTA:** Articles will link to the full webinar recording, not a demo.](https://fathom.video/share/Lw1MVFY3MoYMZgGozywGx4hBE78C4Uxt?tab=summary&timestamp=1716.0)
  - [**Client Alignment:** Bailey will present conflicting feedback in client syncs to force team-wide alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/Lw1MVFY3MoYMZgGozywGx4hBE78C4Uxt?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/Lw1MVFY3MoYMZgGozywGx4hBE78C4Uxt?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
      - [Draft Notion doc on the content process and share with Mariana.](https://fathom.video/share/Lw1MVFY3MoYMZgGozywGx4hBE78C4Uxt?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
      - [Request client assets: sales battle cards/objections list and IT documentation.](https://fathom.video/share/Lw1MVFY3MoYMZgGozywGx4hBE78C4Uxt?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
      - [Collect past webinar transcripts for repurposing.](https://fathom.video/share/Lw1MVFY3MoYMZgGozywGx4hBE78C4Uxt?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)
      - [Present conflicting feedback examples in client syncs.](https://fathom.video/share/Lw1MVFY3MoYMZgGozywGx4hBE78C4Uxt?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)
  - [**Mariana:**](https://fathom.video/share/Lw1MVFY3MoYMZgGozywGx4hBE78C4Uxt?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
      - [Rebuild the manufacturing plant article, incorporating vetted stats.](https://fathom.video/share/Lw1MVFY3MoYMZgGozywGx4hBE78C4Uxt?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
      - [Conduct a keyword gap analysis for Ambient next week.](https://fathom.video/share/Lw1MVFY3MoYMZgGozywGx4hBE78C4Uxt?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)
      - [Send conflicting feedback examples to Bailey for syncs.](https://fathom.video/share/Lw1MVFY3MoYMZgGozywGx4hBE78C4Uxt?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)
